title: TestLab TCK Manifest (kind: tck)
description: JSON Schema for TestLab YAML Syntax v2 TCK manifest files. Licensed under Apache-2.0. See https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

kind.description: Document type identifier. Must be 'tck' for TCK manifests.

name.description: Unique identifier for this TCK. Used in logs and package manifests.

description.description: Human-readable description of the TCK purpose.

author.description: Author or team responsible for this TCK.

standards.description: List of standards this TCK validates against.

env.description: Environment block defining variables, services, and schemas inherited by all tests.

preconditions.description: Steps executed before any test. Their returns are visible to all tests.

tests.description: Ordered list of test file references to execute.

standard.description: A standard reference with ID and version.

env.description: Environment configuration inherited by all tests in this TCK.

variables.description: Map of variable definitions available as ${{ env.x }} in all tests.

services.description: List of service definitions available to steps via the 'service' parameter.

schemas.description: Map of schema imports. Keys are schema names, values define the file path.

variableDefinition.description: A variable definition with class, acquisition type, and optional default.

class.description: Semantic class of this variable (from the class registry).

type.description: How the variable value is acquired at runtime.

description.description: Human-readable description of this variable's purpose.

required.description: Whether this variable must be supplied at runtime.

default.description: Default value if not supplied at runtime. Can be any type.

secret.description: Whether this variable contains sensitive data. Secrets are masked in logs and excluded from exports.

generator.description: Generator function name. Required when type is 'function'.

serviceDefinition.description: A service definition that steps can reference by name.

name.description: Service identifier used in step 'with' blocks.

uses.description: Service type from the service type registry.

role.description: Relationship of this service to the test: internal (TestLab-owned), external (SUT), or additional (supporting infrastructure).

version.description: Dataspace protocol version. Required for edc_connector.

with.description: Configuration parameters for the service. Supports ${{ env.x }} interpolation.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for connecting to this service.

api_key.description: API key value or ${{ env.x }} reference. Used when type is 'api_key'.

token_url.description: OAuth2 token endpoint URL. Required when type is 'oauth2'.

client_id.description: OAuth2 client ID. Required when type is 'oauth2'.

client_secret.description: OAuth2 client secret. Required when type is 'oauth2'.

schemaImport.description: A schema import referencing an external schema file.

file.description: Relative file path to the schema YAML file.

testReference.description: A reference to a test file with an optional human-readable name.

test.description: Relative file path to the test YAML file.

name.description: Optional human-readable name for this test reference.

step.description: A step definition representing a single operation in the test flow.

id.description: Stable step identifier. Must be unique within the file.

name.description: Human-readable label for logs and reports.

with.description: Input parameters passed to the step handler. Supports ${{ }} interpolation.

returns.description: Typed output declarations. Keys are output variable names.

validate.description: Inline assertions evaluated against the step result.

returnDefinition.description: A typed return value declaration for a step output.

type.description: Data type of the return value.

class.description: Semantic class from the class registry (ADR-0009).
